info.title: Mechanic Shop API
info.description: RESTful API for managing customers, mechanics, service tickets, and inventory.

BearerAuth.name: Authorization
BearerAuth.description: Enter: Bearer followed by the JWT token

tags.name: Service Tickets
tags.description: Service ticket creation and relationship management

post.description: Creates a new customer after validating the request body and confirming that the email is not already in use.

application/json.error: Email already associated with an account.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of customers.

post.description: Validates customer credentials and returns a JWT Bearer Token.

get.description: Returns all service tickets belonging to the authenticated customer.
Retrieves a single customer using the ID provided in the URL.

put.description: Updates the authenticated customer's information. The token customer ID must match the URL customer ID.

403.description: Authenticated customer does not match requested customer

delete.description: Deletes the authenticated customer and their related service tickets.

403.description: Authenticated customer does not match requested customer

post.description: Creates a new mechanic after validating the request body and confirming that the email is not already associated with another mechanic.

application/json.error: Email already associated with a mechanic.

get.description: Returns a list of all mechanics stored in the database.

post.description: Validates mechanic credentials and returns a mechanic-specific JWT Bearer Token.

get.summary: Get mechanics ranked by ticket count
get.description: Returns mechanics ordered from the highest to lowest number of assigned service tickets.
Retrieves a single mechanic using the ID provided in the URL.

put.description: Updates the authenticated mechanic's information. The mechanic ID stored in the token must match the mechanic ID in the URL.

403.description: Authenticated mechanic does not match the requested mechanic

delete.description: Deletes the authenticated mechanic and removes their service-ticket relationships without deleting the service tickets.

post.description: Creates a new service ticket for an existing customer.

get.description: Returns all service tickets stored in the database.
Retrieves a single service ticket using the ID provided in the URL.

put.description: Adds a mechanic to the service ticket's mechanics relationship.

404.description: Service ticket or mechanic not found

put.description: Removes an existing mechanic relationship from a service ticket without deleting either record.

404.description: Service ticket or mechanic not found

put.description: Adds and removes multiple mechanics from a service ticket in a single request.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Mechanic IDs to add to or remove from the service ticket

put.summary: Add inventory part to service ticket
put.description: Associates an inventory part with an existing service ticket.

application/json.message: Part added to service ticket successfully

404.description: Service ticket or inventory item not found

post.description: Creates a new inventory part with a name and price.

get.description: Returns every inventory part stored in the database.
Retrieves a single inventory item using the ID provided in the URL.

put.description: Updates one or more fields on an existing inventory item.

delete.description: Deletes an inventory item and removes its service-ticket relationships without deleting any service tickets.
